PARAM.description: id must not be null or empty
PARAM.name: id

PARAM.description: strictChecking must be a boolean value
PARAM.name: strictChecking
PARAM.content: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.

PARAM.description: autoCreate must be a boolean value
PARAM.name: autoCreate
PARAM.content: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are automatically created when referenced when creating a edge, even if not yet inserted in the graph.

PARAM.description: initialNodeCapacity must be a non-negative integer
PARAM.name: initialNodeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the node storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of nodes of the graph. The graph can grow beyond this limit, but storage reallocation is expensive operation.

PARAM.description: initialEdgeCapacity must be a non-negative integer
PARAM.name: initialEdgeCapacity
PARAM.content: Initial capacity of the edge storage data structures. Use this if you know the approximate maximum number of edges of the graph. The graph can grow beyond this limit, but storage reallocation is expensive operation.

PARAM.description: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.
PARAM.name: strictChecking
PARAM.content: If true any non-fatal error throws an exception.

PARAM.description: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are\n           automatically created when referenced when creating a edge,\n           even if not yet inserted in the graph.
PARAM.name: autoCreate
PARAM.content: If true (and strict checking is false), nodes are\n           automatically created when referenced when creating a edge,\n           even if not yet inserted in the graph.
